positive: Minimalist, high-contrast illustration of a cosmic sloth hanging peacefully from a crescent moon. The sloth has a clean, stylized silhouette, rendered in deep indigo and cream tones. Around it, nebula dust swirls in shades of lavender, turquoise, and gold. The style should be retro-futuristic, clean graphic vector art, suitable for apparel printing. Central composition, perfect symmetry, smooth gradient transitions, volumetric lighting that emphasizes the silhouette's shape. Isolated on a solid, neutral off-white background. Highly detailed, print-ready, crisp lines, no photographic elements. --ar 1:1
negative: photo, photorealistic, 3d render, blurry, noisy, watermark, text, signature, logos, low resolution, extra limbs, deformed, bad anatomy, bokeh, excessive detail
